name: Asparagus Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup mayonnaise or reduced calorie mayonnaise
10 1/2 ounces green giant cut spears asparagus, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Stir until well combined.
3. Cover and refrigerate several hours to blend flavors.
4. Serve with crackers or chips.
A healthful but flavorful dip you can make ahead.
